mapper.select:
SELECT w.id AS workId, w.title AS workTitle, w.tech_stack AS techStack, w.cover_url AS coverUrl, w.advisor AS advisor, w.submit_time AS submitTime, ROUND(AVG(ws.total), 2) AS avgScore, ROUND(AVG(ws.innovation), 2) AS avgInnovation, ROUND(AVG(ws.difficulty), 2) AS avgDifficulty, ROUND(AVG(ws.completion), 2) AS avgCompletion, ROUND(AVG(ws.practicality), 2) AS avgPracticality, COUNT(ws.id) AS teacherCount FROM work w INNER JOIN work_score ws ON w.id = ws.work_id AND ws.deleted = 0
w.deleted = 0 AND w.status = 3 AND w.batch_id = #{batchId}
AND w.tech_stack LIKE CONCAT('%', #{techStack}, '%')
GROUP BY w.id ORDER BY avgScore DESC, avgCompletion DESC, avgInnovation DESC, w.submit_time ASC

SELECT DISTINCT w.tech_stack FROM work w INNER JOIN work_score ws ON w.id = ws.work_id AND ws.deleted = 0 WHERE w.deleted = 0 AND w.status = 3 AND w.tech_stack IS NOT NULL AND w.tech_stack != '' AND w.batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY w.tech_stack ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.id) FROM work w INNER JOIN work_score ws ON w.id = ws.work_id AND ws.deleted = 0 WHERE w.deleted = 0 AND w.status = 3 AND w.batch_id = #{batchId}

SELECT CASE WHEN avg_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN avg_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN avg_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN avg_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '60以下' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(ws.total), 0) AS avg_score FROM work w INNER JOIN work_score ws ON w.id = ws.work_id AND ws.deleted = 0 WHERE w.deleted = 0 AND w.status = 3 GROUP BY w.id ) t GROUP BY name ORDER BY name

SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 FROM ( SELECT w.id FROM work w INNER JOIN work_score ws ON w.id = ws.work_id AND ws.deleted = 0 WHERE w.deleted = 0 AND w.status = 3 AND w.batch_id = #{batchId} GROUP BY w.id HAVING AVG(ws.total) > ( SELECT AVG(ws2.total) FROM work_score ws2 WHERE ws2.work_id = #{workId} AND ws2.deleted = 0 ) ) t
